name: trianglify

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a colorful low-poly (Delaunay-triangulated gradient mesh) background, cover, or placeholder: width/height/cellSize/xColors/seed produces canvas or SVG, and the same seed produces the same reproducible image. Use it for static low-poly generative art; use granim for dynamic fluid gradients. Note that its license is GPL-3.0 (copyleft): loading a built artifact at runtime from a CDN is fine, but bundling it into your distribution triggers GPL obligations, so evaluate before redistribution.
en.why_valuable: Delaunay triangulation plus per-cell centroid coloring plus a deterministic PRNG is real computational geometry, and native AI cannot hand-draw a credible low-poly mesh; trianglify includes chroma color-scale interpolation and a mulberry32 seed, producing appendable canvas/SVG nodes with no global side effects.

data_in.note: trianglify(opts) -> Pattern; pattern.toCanvas(destCanvas?) returns a canvas (creating one when omitted), while pattern.toSVG(destSVG?) returns an SVG DOM node in the browser. Unknown keys in opts produce console.warn. Verified defaults: width 600, height 400, cellSize 75, xColors 'random', yColors 'match'.

schema.cellSize?: number -- default 75; smaller values produce denser triangles
schema.variance?: number -- 0..1 random vertex jitter (0 = regular grid)
schema.seed?: string | number | null -- deterministic seed; the same seed produces the same image; default null (random)
schema.xColors?: string | string[] -- colorbrewer name (such as 'YlGnBu'/'Spectral') or color-value array; default 'random'
schema.colorFunction?: function -- advanced: custom per-cell color callback

spec.note: canvas/SVG dimensions are opts.width*opts.height (default 600x400); in a widget, add style.maxWidth:100% and height:auto to canvas for responsive display. vh/percentage height is prohibited.

when_to_use: 需要一张彩色低多边形(Delaunay 三角化渐变网格)背景/封面/占位图时用它:给 width/height/cellSize/xColors/seed 就出 canvas 或 SVG,同 seed 出同图(可复现)。用于静态低多边形生成艺术;要动态流体渐变用 granim。注意 license 是 GPL-3.0(copyleft):CDN 运行期加载已构建产物没问题,但把它 bundle 进你的分发物会传染 GPL,再分发前须评估。
why_valuable: Delaunay 三角化 + 逐格质心取色 + 决定性 PRNG 是真正的计算几何,原生 AI 徒手画不出可信的低多边形网格;trianglify 内置 chroma 色标插值与 mulberry32 种子,零全局副作用地产出可直接 append 的 canvas/SVG 节点。

data_in.note: trianglify(opts) → Pattern;pattern.toCanvas(destCanvas?) 返回 canvas(不传则新建),pattern.toSVG(destSVG?) 在浏览器返回 SVG DOM 节点。opts 里出现未知 key 会 console.warn。已验证默认:width 600、height 400、cellSize 75、xColors 'random'、yColors 'match'。

schema.cellSize?: number —— 默认 75,越小三角越密
schema.variance?: number —— 0..1 顶点随机抖动量(0=规则网格)
schema.seed?: string | number | null —— 决定性种子,同种子同图;默认 null(随机)
schema.xColors?: string | string[] —— colorbrewer 名(如 'YlGnBu'/'Spectral')或色值数组;默认 'random'
schema.yColors?: string | string[] | 'match' —— 默认 'match'(纵向沿用 xColors)
schema.colorFunction?: function —— 高级:自定义逐格取色回调

spec.note: canvas/SVG 尺寸即 opts.width×opts.height(默认 600×400);widget 内建议给 canvas 加 style.maxWidth:100%、height:auto 自适应,禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: 钉死 opts 直接是顶层字段(不含 data 包裹),xColors 接受 colorbrewer 名,seed 决定性。

carriers.widget: supported:产出游离 canvas/SVG 节点直接 append 进 shadow,无 CSS/全局副作用
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,纯 CPU 几何,无 worker/wasm

isolation.evidence: +esm 导出 default trianglify(opts) 及 named {Pattern, colorFunctions, defaultOptions, utils}。src/trianglify.js:trianglify(opts) 校验 width/height(<=0 抛 TypeError),返回 new Pattern(points, polys, opts),defaultOptions 含 width:600/height:400/cellSize:75/xColors:'random'。src/pattern.js:toCanvas(destCanvas?, opts?) 用 destCanvas||createCanvas(w,h) 画 2D;toSVG(destSVG?, opts?) 浏览器分支(sDOM)返回 SVG DOM 节点,toSVGTree() 返回可序列化节点。+esm 隔离扫描:document.head/body=0、createElement('style')=0、insertRule=0、监听=0 —— 零全局足迹(chroma 内联打包)。LICENSE:package.json license='GPL-3.0'(copyleft)—— 运行期加载 CDN 产物 OK,但 bundle 进再分发物会传染 GPL,须提前评估。
